name: pilot-azure
description: Azure / Bicep / ACA governance: CAF naming, security baseline, Well-Architected review, Bicep patterns, observability, CI/CD security (OIDC), multi-region DR, cost/FinOps, AKS, API Management, landing zones, SLO/error budgets, and container image security. Ships @infra-reviewer (finds violations), @infra-implementor (fixes them), and @infra-support (diagnoses live infrastructure issues; live Azure MCP diagnostics are opt-in via .mcp.json.example)
